solara.name: Solara Basin
solara.description: The safe starting world. Balanced yields, light infrastructure, and a stable environment to learn the basics.

ferros.name: Ferros Cradle
ferros.description: A metallic world where ferrite veins are dense but fuel-bearing deposits are scarce.

verdara.name: Verdara Drift
verdara.description: A volatile atmosphere makes oxygen easy to harvest and ferrite harder to pull cleanly.

glassmere.name: Glassmere Expanse
glassmere.description: A blinding desert basin rich in silica dunes, with just enough atmosphere to support export staging.

cinder.name: Cinder Span
cinder.description: An ash-choked furnace planet where carbon is plentiful and everything else fights back.

voltaris.name: Voltaris Coil
voltaris.description: A storm-wrapped conductor world where copper seams run hot beneath a violent electric sky.

nivalis.name: Nivalis Drift
nivalis.description: A frozen gas-rich world where hydrogen pockets and bright mineral frost make every haul feel unstable.

titanreach.name: Titanreach Forge
titanreach.description: A brutal heavy-gravity foundry world with deep titanium strata and industrial ferrite belts.

umbra.name: Umbra Vault
umbra.description: A dim fractured world where rare crystals grow in shadowed caverns and every survey feels expensive.

helion.name: Helion Breach
helion.description: The highest-tier frontier world. Irradiated seams of uranium make it dangerous, lucrative, and worth building for.
